zh.lifeSummary: 當Cleménce de Luxembourg- Namur於1110年出生在比利時納姆爾納姆爾時，她的父親Godfrey de Namur44歲，母親Ermesinde von Luxembourg31歲。她和Conrad I von Zähringen至少有5個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1158年12月28日在德國巴登可萊斯 福包格亞林根享年48歲，埋葬在德國巴登-爾特波格布萊斯高。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Cleménce
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval French and English form of Latin Clementia, a derivative of Clemens ( see Clement ) or an abstract noun meaning ‘mercy’. It was fairly popular in Britain from the late medieval period until the 17th century, but has since been used less often.

en.lifeSummary: When Cleménce de Luxembourg- Namur was born in 1110, in Namur, Namur, Belgium, her father, Godfrey de Namur, was 44 and her mother, Ermesinde von Luxembourg, was 31. She had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with Conrad I von Zähringen. She died on 28 December 1158, in Zähringen, Kreis Freiburg, Baden, Germany, at the age of 48, and was buried in Breisgau, Baden-Württemberg, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cleménce de Luxembourg- Namur est née en 1110, à Namur, Namur, Belgique, son père, Godfrey de Namur, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Ermesinde von Luxembourg, avait 31 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille avec Conrad I von Zähringen. Elle est décédée le 28 décembre 1158, à Zähringen, Kreis Freiburg, Baden, Allemagne, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterrée à Breisgau, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cleménce de Luxembourg- Namur 1110 in Namur, Namen, Belgien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Godfrey de Namur 44 und ihre Mutter Ermesinde von Luxembourg 31. Sie hatte mit Conrad I von Zähringen mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 28. Dezember 1158 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Zähringen, Kreis Freiburg, Baden, Deutschland und wurde in Breisgau, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cleménce de Luxembourg- Namur è nata il nel 1110 nel Namur, Namur, Belgio, sua padre, Godfrey de Namur, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Ermesinde von Luxembourg, aveva 31 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia con Conrad I von Zähringen. Morì il 28 dicembre 1158, nel Zähringen, Kreis Freiburg, Baden, Germania, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolta a Breisgau, Baden-Württemberg, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Cleménce de Luxembourg- Namurが1110年にベルギーナムルナムルで生まれた時，父Godfrey de Namurは44歳，母Ermesinde von Luxembourgは31歳であった。彼女はConrad I von Zähringenとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1158年12月28日にドイツバデンクレイス フレイブルグズahリンジェンで48歳で死去し，ドイツバデン-ウuルッテンバーグブレイスガウにて埋葬された。

ko.Zahringen, Baden-Wurttemberg, Germany: 독일 바데-wu르테버그 프레이버그 임 브레이스가 즈ah링
ko.lifeSummary: Cleménce de Luxembourg- Namur(이)가 1110년 벨기에 남어 남어에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Godfrey de Namur(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ermesinde von Luxembourg(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 Conrad I von Zähringen(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1158년 12월 28일 독일 바든 크레이스 프레이버그 즈ah링에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 바데-wu르테버그 브레이스가에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cleménce de Luxembourg- Namur nasceu em 1110, em Namur, Namur, Bélgica, seu pai, Godfrey de Namur, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Ermesinde von Luxembourg, tinha 31 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha com Conrad I von Zähringen. Ela faleceu em 28 de dezembro de 1158, em Zähringen, Kreis Freiburg, Baden, Alemanha, com 48 anos, e foi sepultada em Breisgau, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha.

ru.Zahringen, Baden-Wurttemberg, Germany: зaхринген, фрибург им брисгау, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cleménce de Luxembourg- Namur родилась в 1110 г. в местности намур, намур, Бельгия, её отцу по имени Godfrey de Namur было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Ermesinde von Luxembourg, 31. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь от Conrad I von Zähringen. Она умерла 28 декабря 1158 г. в местности зaхринген, крис фрибург, баден, Германия в возрасте 48 лет и была похоронена в местности брисгау, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия.

Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija con Conrad I von Zähringen. Murió el 28 de diciembre de 1158, en Zähringen, Kreis Freiburg, Baden, Alemania, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultada en Breisgau, Baden-Württemberg, Alemania.
